allow: PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\Leo\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-Leo-Desktop-clashofclans"; $files = @\("98a2f941-e748-4cc4-aac0-a94a9e3516f5.jsonl","ab52aad4-2be2-45e3-aeac-3776b8c8e63f.jsonl","2e114f94-eab2-4707-8ffc-e443b5e0e7d8.jsonl"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $p = Join-Path $dir $f; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($p\); $nulls = \($bytes | Where-Object { $_ -eq 0 }\).Count; Write-Output \("{0}: size={1} nulls={2}" -f $f, $bytes.Length, $nulls\); if \($nulls -gt 0\) { for \($i=0; $i -lt $bytes.Length; $i++\) { if \($bytes[$i] -eq 0\) { Write-Output \("  first null at byte $i"\); break } } }; $tail = $bytes[\($bytes.Length-60\)..\($bytes.Length-1\)]; Write-Output \("  last bytes: " + \($tail -join ','\)\) })

PowerShell($p = "C:\\Users\\Leo\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-Leo-Desktop-clashofclans\\2e114f94-eab2-4707-8ffc-e443b5e0e7d8.jsonl"; Copy-Item $p "$p.bak"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($p\); $firstNull = 7582991; $cut = $firstNull; while \($cut -gt 0 -and $bytes[$cut-1] -ne 10\) { $cut-- }; Write-Output "Truncating at byte $cut \(was $\($bytes.Length\)\)"; $clean = $bytes[0..\($cut-1\)]; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($p, $clean\); $newSize = \(Get-Item $p\).Length; Write-Output "New size: $newSize"; $newBytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($p\); $tail = $newBytes[\($newBytes.Length-80\)..\($newBytes.Length-1\)]; Write-Output \("Last bytes: " + [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($tail\)\))
